heroHeadline: China's AI Robot Breaks Human Marathon Record; ByteDance Profits -70% Fueling $22B AI Chip Blitz; MiniMax Reaches Global #4
heroSubtitle: A Chinese humanoid robot ran a half-marathon faster than any human (Apr 19); ByteDance plans 160B yuan AI capex in 2026 despite 70% profit drop; MiniMax ranked 4th globally in AI model share at 1/15th the cost of US rivals; YMTC plans two new Wuhan fabs crossing 50% domestic tooling threshold; China's daily AI token consumption hit 140 trillion — up 1,400x since Jan 2024
footerNote: Data sourced from MIIT, BIS, Bloomberg, FT, SCMP, CSET, Nikkei Asia, TechInsights, DeepSeek, Huawei Annual Reports, TrendForce, US Trade Representative, CBP, China MOFCOM, Stanford HAI AI Index 2026, House Select Committee on CCP, CNN, NPR, Al Jazeera, TechCrunch, Tom's Hardware, DigiTimes, Semafor
